secciones.clip_l: wildlife photography, polar bear, arctic, cold, majestic
secciones.t5xxl: A massive polar bear standing on a floating iceberg, its white fur glowing in the soft arctic light. The bear gazes intently toward the horizon where ice meets a steel-gray ocean under an overcast sky.

secciones.clip_l: landscape photography, autumn road, fall colors, scenic, nostalgic
secciones.t5xxl: A winding country road lined with golden maple trees, their leaves forming a canopy overhead. Early morning mist clings to the ground as sunlight filters through the colorful foliage, creating a magical tunnel of light.

secciones.clip_l: urban photography, dancer silhouette, neon lights, motion blur, dynamic
secciones.t5xxl: A silhouette of a dancer caught mid-movement against a backdrop of pulsating neon signs. The figure's flowing fabric creates streaks of motion against the electric glow of city lights reflected on wet pavement.

secciones.clip_l: steampunk cityscape, brass, Victorian, industrial, fantasy
secciones.t5xxl: An intricate Victorian metropolis with towering brass spires and ornate gearwork. Airships drift between buildings connected by elaborate pulley systems, while steam rises from copper pipes and polished metal surfaces gleam in the amber light.

secciones.clip_l: cyberpunk architecture, vertical city, LED lights, futuristic, dense
secciones.t5xxl: A towering megastructure reaching into the clouds, its facade covered in cascading neon advertisements and digital signage. Window boxes and aerial walkways crisscross the building as flying vehicles weave between them in organized chaos.

secciones.clip_l: fantasy art, nine-tailed fox, ethereal, magical, mystical
secciones.t5xxl: An enormous celestial fox with nine flowing tails standing in a moonlit clearing. Each tail tip glows with a different color of spiritual energy as cherry blossom petals swirl around this ancient and powerful spirit guardian.

secciones.clip_l: underwater ruins, ancient temple, coral, aquatic, discovery
secciones.t5xxl: An ancient stone temple slowly being reclaimed by the ocean, coral gardens growing over carved facades. Sunlight streams down from above, illuminating schools of tropical fish swimming through broken archways and across weathered mosaics.

secciones.clip_l: astrophotography, desert stars, milky way, camping, remote
secciones.t5xxl: An endless sea of sand dunes under an impossibly star-filled sky. The Milky Way arches overhead like a celestial river, while a small campfire flickers below, its warmth a stark contrast to the vast cold universe above.

secciones.clip_l: epic fantasy, dragon in flight, storm clouds, dramatic, scale
secciones.t5xxl: A massive ancient dragon with leathery wings spread wide, soaring through a thundercloud formation. Lightning illuminates the creature's silhouette as it dives toward a mountain range far below, wings beating against the turbulent winds.

secciones.clip_l: street photography, musician, cobblestones, evening, passionate
secciones.t5xxl: An elderly violinist playing with intense emotion on a rain-slicked European street. His weathered hands move skillfully along the fingerboard while a fedora hat rests on the ground beside a worn instrument case, collecting spare change.

secciones.clip_l: sci-fi interior, space station, futuristic, realistic, zero gravity
secciones.t5xxl: The interior of a massive rotating space habitat with multiple levels of habitation rings. Through the panoramic windows, Earth fills the view while interior gardens and water features create a sense of normalcy amid the cosmic void.

secciones.clip_l: cinematic photo, window rain, city lights, moody, introspective
secciones.t5xxl: Raindrops trace patterns on a windowpane while the blurred lights of a city at night reflect in the glass. Inside, a warm lamp creates a cocoon of light against the cool blue darkness visible beyond the curtain of water.

secciones.clip_l: historical painting, medieval tavern, warm lighting, cozy, crowded
secciones.t5xxl: A bustling medieval tavern interior with wooden beams overhead and a roaring fireplace at its center. Patrons in period clothing laugh and drink from tankards while a minstrel plays a lute in the corner, smoke from the hearth creating a convivial atmosphere.

secciones.clip_l: cultural photography, kimono, cherry blossoms, spring, traditional
secciones.t5xxl: A woman in a flowing silk kimono walking beneath branches heavy with pink cherry blossoms. Petals drift down like snow around her, some catching in her hair and others floating on the gentle spring breeze that carries their delicate fragrance.

secciones.clip_l: action photography, falconry, bird of prey, desert, traditional
secciones.t5xxl: A peregrine falcon locked onto its target during a hunt, wings tucked and diving at incredible speed. The bird's sharp eyes never leave the quarry below as it plummets from the sky in a controlled stoop, the master of aerial pursuit.

secciones.clip_l: landscape photography, canyon sunrise, layered rock, vast, geological
secciones.t5xxl: The first rays of sunlight strike the rim of a vast desert canyon, setting fire to the layered sandstone formations below. Deep shadows still cling to the bottom while the sky transitions from indigo to brilliant orange and gold.

secciones.clip_l: documentary photography, blacksmith, forging, sparks, hot metal
secciones.t5xxl: A blacksmith hammers a red-hot blade on an anvil, sparks flying in all directions as hammer meets steel. The glow from the forge illuminates his focused expression and the walls lined with tools of his ancient craft passed down through generations.

secciones.clip_l: dramatic photography, lighthouse beam, storm, maritime, heroic
secciones.t5xxl: A lighthouse beam cuts through a raging tempest, its rotating light visible through sheets of rain and crashing waves. The tower stands defiant against the elements as foam-capped swells explode against the rocks below in explosive bursts.

secciones.clip_l: wildlife photography, macaw parrot, tropical, colorful, rainforest
secciones.t5xxl: A brilliant blue-and-gold macaw perches on a branch in the heart of a lush rainforest. Sunlight filters through the canopy above, creating dappled patterns on its vibrant feathers while orchids bloom around this regal tropical sentinel.

secciones.clip_l: street photography, wet cobblestones, gas lamps, moody, historic
secciones.t5xxl: Rain-slicked cobblestones reflect the warm glow of vintage gas lamps in an old European town. The empty street glistens under the amber light that pools like liquid gold while shadows stretch long and mysterious in the quiet evening air.

secciones.clip_l: astrophotography, northern lights, frozen lake, arctic, ethereal
secciones.t5xxl: The aurora borealis dances across a star-filled sky in ribbons of green and purple, its ethereal curtains reflected in the perfectly still waters of a frozen arctic lake. Ice formations catch the celestial light like frozen fireworks suspended in time.

secciones.clip_l: performance photography, falconry, trainer, eagle, intense
secciones.t5xxl: A falconer performs with a magnificent golden eagle, the bird spreading its wings wide in a display of power and beauty. The audience watches in awe as the eagle's shadow falls across them, a living embodiment of wild freedom and ancient partnership.

secciones.clip_l: landscape photography, buddhist monastery, mountain, misty, spiritual
secciones.t5xxl: A secluded Buddhist monastery clings to a mountainside shrouded in morning mist. Prayer flags flutter in the thin air while the first light of dawn touches the golden rooftops, promising enlightenment to those who seek it in these remote heights.

secciones.clip_l: adventure photography, tropical waterfall, jungle pool, refreshing, vibrant
secciones.t5xxl: A powerful waterfall crashes into a pristine jungle pool, the force of the water creating a perpetual rainbow in the spray. Lush vegetation frames this natural wonder where the brave can swim in waters cooled by the eternal cascade from above.

secciones.clip_l: historical art, viking ship, icy waves, warriors, epic
secciones.t5xxl: A Viking longship cuts through churning arctic waters, its dragon-headed prow leading warriors toward new lands. Oars dip in synchronized rhythm while warriors chant battle songs, their breath visible in the cold air as adventure awaits on the horizon.

secciones.clip_l: wildlife photography, polar bear, ice field, arctic, endangered
secciones.t5xxl: A regal polar bear traverses a fractured ice field under an endless arctic sky. Its massive form moves with surprising grace across the frozen landscape where every step could be the difference between survival and the icy depths below.

secciones.clip_l: cultural photography, night lanterns, cherry blossoms, magical, serene
secciones.t5xxl: Cherry blossoms illuminated by paper lanterns create an ethereal pathway through darkness. The soft warm light contrasts beautifully with the cool blue ambient, creating a magical atmosphere where earth and heaven seem to merge in perfect harmony.

secciones.clip_l: sports photography, motorcycle racing, speed, track, action
secciones.t5xxl: Motorcycles lean into a curve at breakneck speed, riders at the limits of physics and courage. The track blurs beneath them while exhaust pipes glow red and crowds cheer from the grandstands as machines and mortals dance with velocity.

secciones.clip_l: historical photography, old reading room, bookshelves, warm lighting, scholarly
secciones.t5xxl: An ancient reading room with towering wooden bookshelves reaching to a painted ceiling. Candlelight creates pools of illumination around reading chairs while the smell of old parchment and wisdom fills the air of this temple dedicated to knowledge.

secciones.natural: A close-up portrait of a woman in her early thirties with dark wavy hair, looking directly at the camera. She's sitting in a warmly lit cafe, late afternoon sun coming through the window behind her, creating a soft halo around her hair. The mood is calm and introspective. Shot on a 50mm lens with shallow depth of field, the background gently blurred into warm amber tones.

A dramatic Scottish highland landscape under a stormy sky. Rolling hills covered in heather and golden grass stretch to the horizon, a ruined stone tower stands alone on a ridge. Heavy clouds parting just enough to let a shaft of silver light cut across the valley. Wide cinematic composition, raw and elemental beauty, no people.

A narrow alley in a neon-lit Asian city district at night during heavy rain. Neon signs in pink and teal reflect in rivers of water running down the street. A street food vendor under a yellow awning, steam rising from their cart. The scene is cinematic and atmospheric, inspired by Blade Runner aesthetics but grounded in real urban life.

An extreme close-up of a single cherry blossom flower with tiny water droplets clinging to the pale pink petals after morning rain. The stamens are sharply in focus at the center, the petals softly blurring at the edges. Shot with a macro lens, very shallow depth of field, soft overcast natural light, delicate and serene mood.

A massive emerald dragon perched on the spire of a ruined gothic cathedral, silhouetted against a sky torn between thunderclouds and a blood-red sunset. Its wings are half-spread, scales catching the dying light. The scene has the scale and grandeur of a fantasy epic film, photorealistic rendering with dramatic atmospheric depth.

A sprawling futuristic megacity seen from a high vantage point at dusk. Thousands of lit windows in towering glass spires, flying vehicles leaving light trails between buildings, holograms of advertisements projected against the low clouds. The horizon glows orange and purple. Photorealistic and detailed, with a sense of overwhelming scale and human density.

A fashion editorial photograph of a woman wearing a deconstructed white linen suit against a crumbling beige plaster wall in southern Italy. Midday sun is harsh but she stands in a sliver of shade, the light edging her shoulder. The composition is slightly off-center. The mood is effortless, Mediterranean, and understated luxury.

The interior of a minimalist chapel made of raw concrete and dark weathered wood, with a single long skylight running the length of the ceiling. Morning light enters as a sharp blade, cutting across the rows of simple wooden pews. The space is completely empty. The photograph captures silence and geometry, inspired by the work of Tadao Ando.

A handmade ceramic coffee mug with a matte earth-tone glaze sitting on a rough-hewn wooden table beside a sprig of dried lavender. Morning window light from the left, soft and warm. Steam rising gently from the mug. The image has the feel of a high-quality lifestyle brand photograph, slow and intentional, emphasizing craft and texture.

An abstract art piece resembling slow-moving tidal flows of pigment — deep ocean blue merging into burnt sienna and pale cream in long diagonal sweeps. The texture is rich, almost three-dimensional, like oil paint applied with a palette knife. The image is large format, meant to be contemplative, somewhere between a seascape and pure abstraction.

A vast desert landscape stretching to the horizon under an amber sunset sky. Wind-sculpted sand dunes create organic patterns, their curves catching the last light of day. A few hardy desert shrubs dot the foreground. The scene evokes silence and timelessness, the raw beauty of arid wilderness.

A farmhouse kitchen with weathered wooden beams and vintage appliances. A cast iron stove glows with warmth, copper pots hang from a rack, and fresh bread cools on a wire rack. Morning light streams through gingham-curtained windows, illuminating flour dust in the air.

A grand Victorian train station with a soaring glass ceiling, intricate ironwork, and a parade of travelers with luggage. Steam billows from beneath a locomotive at the platform, while the ornate clock shows departure time. The atmosphere combines urgency with timeless elegance.

A narrow used bookstore crammed floor-to-ceiling with books of every size and color. Ladders on wheels lean against shelves, and a ginger cat naps among the stacks. Warm lamplight creates pockets of intimacy in the dusty, knowledge-filled air between the shelves.

A quiet fishing harbor at dawn, with colorful wooden boats gently bobbing in the foreground. The sky shifts from deep indigo to warm oranges and pinks, reflected in the calm water. The lighthouse stands sentinel, and gulls wheel above in the cool morning air.

A potter's studio with wheels and worktables covered in clay slip. Half-finished pots and bowls sit drying, while finished pieces line shelves. A large window lets in soft northern light, perfect for the craft. The space feels creative and grounded, with earth and possibility everywhere.

A suspension bridge spans a dramatic gorge, cables converging toward towers shrouded in morning mist. Below, a river carves through rugged cliffs. The bridge's walkway curves through the fog, creating a sense of journey and connection across impossible space.

Sand dunes stretch endlessly under a harsh midday sun, their patterns constantly reshaped by the wind. A few hardy desert plants dot the foreground while heat waves distort the air above the sand, creating an almost hallucinogenic landscape of earth tones.

A vintage kitchen with weathered wooden beams and an old cast iron stove glowing warmly. Copper pots hang from a rack above the stove while fresh bread cools on a wire rack. Morning light streams through gingham-curtained windows, illuminating flour dust in the air.

A grand Victorian train station at night, its glass roof glowing with warm amber light. Steam billows from beneath a locomotive at the platform while the ornate station clock shows the departure time. The atmosphere combines urgency with timeless elegance as travelers hurry to their destinations.

A narrow used bookstore crammed floor-to-ceiling with books of every size and color. Ladders on wheels lean against shelves, and a ginger cat naps among the stacks. Warm lamplight creates pockets of intimacy in the dusty, knowledge-filled air between the shelves.

A quiet fishing harbor at dawn, with colorful wooden boats gently bobbing in the foreground. The sky shifts from deep indigo to warm oranges and pinks, reflected in the calm water. The lighthouse stands sentinel, and gulls wheel above in the cool morning air.

A potter's studio with wheels and worktables covered in clay slip. Half-finished pots and bowls sit drying while finished pieces line shelves. A large window lets in soft northern light, perfect for the craft. The space feels creative and grounded.

A suspension bridge spans a dramatic gorge high in the mountains, cables converging toward towers shrouded in morning mist. Below, a river carves through rugged cliffs. The bridge's walkway curves through the fog, creating a sense of journey and connection.

An abandoned castle on a rocky crag, shrouded in perpetual mist. Broken towers and collapsed walls speak of forgotten grandeur. Ravens circle overhead while ivy creeps through empty windows, nature reclaiming what was once human domain.

An ancient forest where massive trees form a cathedral-like canopy overhead. Sunlight filters through in dusty beams while exotic birds flit between branches. The air is thick with the scent of moss and the promise of undiscovered wonders.

A vast underground cavern transformed into a hidden city, glowing crystals providing ethereal illumination. Bridges of natural stone connect different levels while waterfalls cascade down crystal formations. The scale and beauty are breathtaking.

A massive spaceship cruises through a colorful nebula, its hull reflecting the swirling colors of stellar gases. Through the bridge windows, crew members watch the cosmic display as the ship's engines pulse with rhythmic blue light, carrying them toward distant stars.

A hidden garden courtyard enclosed by high stone walls covered in climbing roses. A fountain bubbles softly in the center while wrought iron furniture sits invitingly under the dappled shade of ancient olive trees. The scent of jasmine fills the warm afternoon air.

A grand clock tower rises above a medieval town square, its face glowing golden in the twilight. Bells chime the hour as townspeople gather below for the evening market. The cobblestones glisten from recent rain, reflecting the warm light from shop windows.

A grand museum hall with marble floors and a soaring glass ceiling. Visitors wander among ancient sculptures and classical paintings while natural light filters through the skylight above. The space feels both awe-inspiring and contemplative.

A modern research laboratory with sleek white surfaces and equipment that hums with energy. Scientists in white coats examine samples under powerful microscopes while data streams across multiple monitor displays. The atmosphere is one of quiet discovery.

A historic steam train crosses an impressive viaduct spanning a deep valley. The locomotive sends up clouds of white steam as it chugs along the tracks, passengers waving from windows at the scenic view below. Quaint villages dot the landscape.

A vast industrial factory floor with towering machinery and conveyor belts stretching into the distance. Workers in blue coveralls monitor operations while sparks fly from welding stations. The space is organized chaos of productivity.

A professional observatory dome opens to reveal a massive telescope pointed at the heavens. The Milky Way stretches across the sky in brilliant clarity while astronomers huddle over computer screens inside, capturing images of distant galaxies. The night is alive with cosmic wonder.

A luxury resort overlooking turquoise waters, palm trees swaying in the ocean breeze. Guests lounge on white sand beaches while others enjoy water sports in the calm lagoon. The sunset paints the sky in oranges and purples, promising another perfect day tomorrow.

Ancient ruins of a classical temple stand silhouetted against a dramatic sunset sky. Weathered columns support no roof while vines creep through broken stones. The setting sun casts long shadows across the sacred ground, bringing the day to a peaceful close.

The interior of a towering Gothic cathedral with pointed arches and ribbed vaults soaring toward a vaulted ceiling. Light streams through massive stained glass windows, casting colored patterns on the stone floor. The perspective draws the eye upward to intricate ceiling details.

A suspension bridge spans a dramatic gorge during the day, cables converging toward towers. Below, a river carves through rugged cliffs. Cars traverse the span while nature asserts its timeless presence around this modern feat of engineering.

An erupting volcano spewing ash and lava into the atmosphere. The orange glow illuminates the surrounding landscape while lava flows down the mountainside like molten rivers. The raw power of nature is on full display in this primal spectacle.

A bright comet streaking across the starry sky, leaving a luminous trail behind it. The comet's tail glows with ethereal colors while the night landscape below is bathed in soft moonlight. It's a once-in-a-lifetime celestial event witnessed by few.

A massive tornado approaching a farmhouse on the prairie. The dark storm clouds rotate ominously while the funnel extends down to the ground. Debris flies through the air as the storm advances, nature's fury unleashed across the flat landscape.

A spiral galaxy rotating in deep space, its arms filled with billions of stars. Nebulae of pink and blue provide a backdrop for this cosmic dance that has continued for eons. The immensity and beauty are humbling to behold.

A mountain biker descending a rocky trail at high speed, taking a challenging jump over a small gap. The wheels spin furiously while the rider's concentration is absolute. Pine trees blur by on either side in this adrenaline-fueled descent.

Skydivers free-falling from an airplane in formation, the world spread out below them. The blue sky provides a backdrop while clouds rush past at terminal velocity. Below, patches of landscape and water create a patchwork view from this altitude.

An underground cavern with massive crystals protruding from walls and ceiling. The crystal formations catch and refract light from headlamps, creating a magical underground palace of stone and mineral. Stalactites hang like chandeliers in this natural wonder.

A symphony orchestra performing on stage with instruments gleaming under stage lights. The conductor gestures passionately while violinists sway with their bows. The music fills the concert hall, creating an atmosphere of refined culture and artistic expression.

Dark storm clouds swirling overhead with flashes of lightning illuminating the sky. The changing light patterns create drama while the air feels electric with impending rain. Nature's theater unfolds above the quiet landscape below.

A bustling open-air market with colorful stalls selling fresh produce and local crafts. Vendors call out their daily specials while customers haggle over prices. The energy is infectious as the community gathers to shop and socialize.

Ancient ruins of a classical temple stand silhouetted against a dramatic sky. Weathered columns support no roof while the setting sun casts long shadows across the sacred ground. Time has softened the edges but not the sense of grandeur.

A gold miner panning in a rushing mountain stream, the morning sun catching water droplets in the air. The landscape is pristine wilderness while the technique has remained unchanged for centuries. Hope glimmers with every swirl of sediment.

A scientist mixing colorful chemicals in flasks and beakers, each reaction producing fascinating results. Safety equipment surrounds the workspace while the precise measurements and careful techniques speak to years of education and practice in this specialized field.

A tennis player serving during match point, muscles coiled and racket ready to strike. Stadium lights illuminate the court while the crowd blurs in the background. The moment is captured in perfect concentration before ball meets strings.

A vegetable garden with ripe tomatoes and peppers ready for harvest. Morning light makes everything fresh and vibrant while the wooden stakes and irrigation system show careful planning. This is where food begins before reaching the kitchen table.

A tattoo artist working carefully on a client's arm, the needle buzzing steadily. Bright lights illuminate the workspace while detailed artwork takes shape under the artist's skilled hand. The trust between artist and client is essential for this art form.

A professional photography studio with various lighting setups and backdrops. A model poses under carefully arranged strobes while the photographer checks the shot on a monitor. The controlled environment allows for creative perfection.

A nightclub dance floor with a disco ball throwing patterns of light across the crowd. Dancers move to the rhythm while colored lights flash in time with the music. The energy is infectious as inhibitions fall away under the pulsing beat.

A dimly lit dungeon corridor with torchlight flickering against stone walls. The air is thick with history and danger while mysterious shadows dance in the periphery. Adventure awaits around every corner in this fantasy realm.

The interior of a spaceship with LED panels and futuristic controls. An astronaut floats weightlessly while checking instruments that display critical navigation data. The silence of space is broken only by electronic beeps and the hum of life support systems.

A submarine's interior with portholes looking out into the blue depths. Control panels monitor depth and navigation while outside, strange marine life swims past in the alien world beneath the waves. The ocean's mysteries unfold with each dive.

A space station's observation deck with Earth filling the view below. Astronauts float as they conduct experiments while the curvature of the planet provides a stark reminder of their isolation. Solar panels gleam in unfiltered sunlight.

secciones.detalle_sujeto: long black hair, blue eyes, lace lingerie, wet skin
secciones.calidad: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, photorealistic

secciones.detalle_sujeto: naked, smooth skin, curved figure
secciones.calidad: masterpiece, best quality, ultra detailed, photorealistic

modelos.label: SDXL
modelos.desc: Stable Diffusion XL base — tags + frases cortas
modelos.quality_negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, bad anatomy, worst quality, low quality, watermark
modelos.hint_prompt: Tags separados por comas. El orden importa — lo más importante primero. Límite ~77 tokens.
modelos.hint_negative: Tags de lo que quieres eliminar. Muy importantes en este modelo.

modelos.label: SD 1.5
modelos.desc: Stable Diffusion 1.5 — tags puros, orden crítico
modelos.quality_negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, bad anatomy, bad hands, extra fingers, worst quality, low quality, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature
modelos.hint_prompt: Solo tags/keywords separados por comas. Orden muy importante. Máximo 77 tokens útiles.
modelos.hint_negative: Negativos son críticos en SD1.5. Usa un negative extenso para evitar artefactos.
modelos.nota: Negative prompt crítico — usar siempre un negative extenso.

modelos.label: Pony
modelos.desc: Pony Diffusion V6 XL — score tags obligatorios
modelos.quality_negative: score_4, score_5, score_6, ugly, deformed, bad anatomy, worst quality, low quality
modelos.hint_prompt: OBLIGATORIO empezar con score_9, score_8_up. Sin estos tags el modelo asume baja calidad.
modelos.hint_negative: Incluir score_4, score_5, score_6 en negativo es obligatorio para Pony.
modelos.nota: score_9, score_8_up obligatorios. CFG bajo o se sobrecocina.

modelos.label: Illustrious / NoobAI
modelos.desc: Illustrious XL, NoobAI-XL, WAI — tags Danbooru
modelos.quality_positive: masterpiece, best quality, amazing quality, highres, absurdres, newest
modelos.quality_negative: worst quality, bad quality, low quality, sketch, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, bad hands
modelos.hint_prompt: Tags Danbooru — verifica que existan en danbooru.donmai.us. CFG bajo (5–5.5) o se sobrecocina.
modelos.hint_negative: Negatives propios de Illustrious — NO uses score tags de Pony, son incompatibles.
modelos.nota: CFG 5–5.5 ideal. No usar score tags de Pony — incompatibles.
modelos.quality_tags_nsfw: masterpiece, best quality, amazing quality, highres, absurdres, newest, explicit

modelos.label: FLUX 1.x
modelos.desc: FLUX dev/schnell — frases descriptivas, dos campos
modelos.hint_clip_l: clip_l: estilo y calidad en keywords. Ej: «cinematic, professional photography, shallow depth of field»
modelos.hint_t5xxl: t5xxl: descripción narrativa completa. Ej: «A woman with red hair standing in a forest clearing at golden hour, looking at the viewer»
modelos.hint_negative: FLUX ignora los negative prompts — no los uses.
modelos.nota: Sin negative. clip_l = keywords, t5xxl = descripción narrativa.

modelos.label: FLUX 2 / SD3
modelos.hint_prompt: Describe la imagen como si hablaras con un fotógrafo: Sujeto → Acción → Entorno → Iluminación → Estilo. Los quality tags (masterpiece, 8k) son contraproducentes.
modelos.hint_negative: SD3 y FLUX 2 no procesan los negativos correctamente — déjalos vacíos.
modelos.nota: Sin quality tags ni negative. Texto conversacional puro.
